title: Test post
description: A live workflow test post that explicitly asks whether a command can trigger robot analysis, robot handoff, metadata file creation, and GitHub upload.

motifMap.meaning: The post begins from the practical act of entering a command to initiate the workflow.
Sequential robot analysis and file creation become the central object being tested and observed.
The closing claim frames a successful upload as proof that the workflow has become a new operating pattern.

excerpt: To see if I can enter a command and a robot finds this analyzes it, and hands that to another robot...

editHistory: Phase analysis completed before Gemini generation: The Loom and the Horizon / Methodic Self-Watching, based on the post's explicit command-to-analysis-to-metadata-to-GitHub workflow test.
Post-Gemini review filled sparse descriptive fields and corrected generatedOn timestamp while preserving the validated phase call, canonical field order, and body fingerprint.
